response.justification: Bogdan possesses deep domain expertise in geospatial data processing and high-throughput, low-latency distributed systems. While his recent roles heavily feature TypeScript and DLang rather than the explicitly required modern C++ or Rust, his strong foundations in systems programming, Linux environments, and rigorous testing practices make him a highly compelling candidate who could likely adapt quickly to the required tech stack.
strengths: Extensive domain experience in geospatial data processing and building GIS platforms.
Proven track record with high-throughput, low-latency distributed systems and microservices.
Strong emphasis on software craftsmanship, rigorous testing (TDD), and quality assurance methodologies.
concerns: Lacks recent professional experience with modern C++ or Rust, as recent work focuses on TypeScript and DLang.
No direct mention of building specific routing or navigation guidance solutions, primarily general GIS mapping.
Frequent job transitions and concurrent founder/freelance roles might raise questions about long-term focus.
